abilities.description: Investigate. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, investigate twice instead. (To investigate, create a colorless Clue artifact token with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

effect.description: Investigate. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, investigate twice instead. (To investigate, create a colorless Clue artifact token with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
effect.name: Investigate
